emails.subject: Re: Plays and other information
emails.body: Re: Plays and other information Hope all is well. Is this in reference to the Enron/Andersen Consulting football game? When is it? Do you need me to play? Give me a call and we can discuss (3-9557). Thanks, Paul Eric Bass@ECT 11/14/00 12:17 PM

emails.subject: Re: Plays and other information
emails.body: Hey Paul, I left a msg in your voice mail, but the low down is that the ENE/AC Flag Football tourney is Saturday and we would like you to play. The tourney starts at 10 and is 3 hours long. If we win, we get 16 tickets to the game (2 for each of us). Let me know if you are interested. Thanks, Eric x3-0977 From: Paul Burkhart@ENRON COMMUNICATIONS on 11/14/2000 05:51 PM
